tasks.roguelike:compile: cd demos/roguelike && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx gulp build
tasks.currency:compile: cd demos/currency && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx vite build --base=/currency/
tasks.resize:compile: cd demos/resize && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && NODE_ENV=production make all
tasks.state-sync:compile: cd demos/state-sync && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all
tasks.reasonable:compile: cd demos/reasonable/client && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx vite-ssg build --base=/reasonable/
tasks.assemble: rm -rf public && mkdir -p public/h8ball public/roguelike public/currency public/resize public/state-sync public/dvd public/reasonable && cp index.html public/index.html && cp -r demos/h8ball/* public/h8ball/ && cp -r demos/roguelike/dist/* public/roguelike/ && cp -r demos/currency/dist/* public/currency/ && cp -r demos/resize/public/* public/resize/ && cp -r demos/state-sync/public/* public/state-sync/ && cp -r demos/orphans/dvd/* public/dvd/ && cp -r demos/reasonable/client/dist/* public/reasonable/
tasks.build: deno task roguelike:compile && deno task currency:compile && deno task resize:compile && deno task state-sync:compile && deno task reasonable:compile && deno task assemble
tasks.build:docker: docker run --rm -v "$PWD/demos:/demos" -w /demos node:10-buster sh -c 'cd roguelike && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx gulp build' && docker run --rm -v "$PWD/demos:/demos" -w /demos node:16-buster sh -c 'cd currency && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx vite build --base=/currency/ && cd ../resize && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && NODE_ENV=production make all && cd ../state-sync && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all' && docker run --rm -v "$PWD/demos:/demos" -w /demos node:20-slim sh -c 'cd reasonable/client && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx vite-ssg build --base=/reasonable/' && deno task assemble
